video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 3 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: stage three of the jedi italia started in for the first time in its history five riders managed to get away fairly quickly and with 150 kilometers on the map still to go we learned that garand thomas had crashed in the neutral zone back in the peliton and part of riders chasing an eight-man group up the road with kaiser getting across at the last minute the croatian champ rematch would be one of the riders up there as well as would carpenters and bill mitchell and scott would go to work early on simon yates presumably feeling very good they wouldn't give the break more than five minutes there are a few problems for antonio newbury in the middle of the bunch trying to hold on to his drinks and a few nervous moments for everybody in fact on the way to etna one of such was this dog in the middle of the bunch absolutely terrifying for the bunch and for him himself the 20 kilometers to go garrett thomas's giro d'italia gc ambitions were on the ground just like he had been in the neutral zone dropped before they even started the climb by this point it was clear we were going to have a new maya rosa as ghana had stayed back to work with thomas and there were moves behind as well bad news for simon yates eight kilometers to go when he lost contract with the group the group's still fairly sizable at this point at the finish line jonathan kaiser had held off the peloton behind and beaten his breakaway companion he'd never won a race outside of ecuador national champion now jira d'italia stage winner and counting the seconds to the manyarosa and looking for the magnet also a group of older experienced riders still in the game led by nebulae and fullsang with micah still there pops of evil and krauswick they finished just around 55 seconds back and joel made a crossing the line to take the majarosa for simon yates it would be quite a bit of time shipped not race ending but certainly making his gc challenge very very difficult from here on i'm glory you
